settings: label:"Agent Auto-Fix Lints",description:"When enabled, Agent is given awareness of lint errors created by its edits and may fix them without explicit user prompt
label:"Agent 自动修复 Lint",description:"启用后，Agent 会自动感知其编辑产生的 lint 错误，并可在无需用户明确提示的情况下修复它们

label:"Strict Mode",description:"When enabled, enforces settings that prevent the agent from autonomously running targeted exploits and requires human review for all agent actions. Visit antigravity.google/docs/strict-mode for details.
label:"严格模式",description:"启用后，将强制执行防止 Agent 自动运行目标漏洞利用的设置，并要求人工审查所有 Agent 操作。详见 antigravity.google/docs/strict-mode。

label:"Enable Sounds for Agent",description:"When enabled, Antigravity will play a sound when Agent finishes generating a response.
label:"Agent 声音提示",description:"启用后，Antigravity 会在 Agent 完成响应生成时播放声音。
label:"Auto-Expand Changes Overview",description:"When enabled, the Changes Overview toolbar will automatically expand when Agent finishes generating a response.
label:"自动展开更改概览",description:"启用后，当 Agent 完成响应生成时，更改概览工具栏将自动展开。
label:"Conversation History",description:"When enabled, the agent will be able to access past conversations to inform its responses.

hps=`Specifies Agent's behavior when asking for review on artifacts, which are documents it creates to enable a richer conversation experience.
hps=`指定 Agent 在请求审查产物（Agent 创建的用于提供更丰富对话体验的文档）时的行为。

`Controls whether terminal commands require your approval before running.

Note: A change to this setting will only apply to new messages sent to Agent. In-progress responses will use the previous setting value.`

`控制终端命令在运行前是否需要您的批准。

注意：对此设置的更改将仅适用于发送给 Agent 的新消息。进行中的响应将使用先前的设置值。`
resolveOptionToString:t=>{switch(t){case rl.EAGER:return"Always Proceed";case rl.OFF:return"Request Review";default:return"Proceed in Sandbox"}}
resolveOptionToString:t=>{switch(t){case rl.EAGER:return"始终继续";case rl.OFF:return"请求审查";default:return"在沙盒中运行"}}

"Agent never asks for confirmation before executing terminal commands (except those in the Deny list). This provides the Agent with the maximum ability to operate over long periods without intervention, but also has the highest risk of an Agent executing an unsafe terminal command."
"Agent 在执行终端命令之前从不请求确认（拒绝列表中的命令除外）。这为 Agent 提供了在没有干预的情况下长期运行的最大能力，但也存在 Agent 执行不安全终端命令的最高风险。"
"Agent always asks for confirmation before executing terminal commands (except those in the Allow list)."
"Agent 在执行终端命令之前始终请求确认（允许列表中的命令除外）。"
"Terminal command automatically proceeds if the command runs inside the sandbox. Otherwise, it requests review."
"如果终端命令在沙盒中运行，则自动执行该命令。否则，它将请求审查。"

" For Unix shells, an allow list entry matches a command if its space-separated tokens form a prefix of the command's tokens. For PowerShell, the entry tokens may match any contiguous subsequence of the command tokens."
" 对于 Unix shell，如果允许列表条目以空格分隔的标记是命令标记的前缀，则该条目匹配该命令。对于 PowerShell，条目标记可以匹配命令标记的任何连续子序列。"
displayResolver:it=>it===rl.EAGER?"始终继续":it===rl.PROCEED_IN_SANDBOX?"在沙盒中运行":"需要审查"

Mr.CASCADE_AUTO_EXECUTION_POLICY:return u===rl.EAGER?"Always Proceed":u===rl.OFF?"Require Review":"Proceed in Sandbox"
Mr.CASCADE_AUTO_EXECUTION_POLICY:return u===rl.EAGER?"始终继续":u===rl.OFF?"需要审查":"在沙盒中运行"
case vh.DISABLED:return"Disabled";case vh.ALWAYS_ASK:return"Request Review";case vh.TURBO:return"Always Proceed";default:return"Request Review"
case vh.DISABLED:return"已禁用";case vh.ALWAYS_ASK:return"请求审查";case vh.TURBO:return"始终继续";default:return"请求审查"

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Editor",label:"Confirm Window Reload",description:'Toggle if a confirmation is shown when using the "Reload Window" button.',settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Enable Demo Mode (Beta)",description:'When enabled, your UI will be slightly modified to ensure more consistent demos. This is only recommended for demo purposes. In most cases, you can run "Antigravity: Start Demo Mode" and "Antigravity: Stop Demo Mode" to control this switch and update your ~/.gemini/antigravity data directory.',settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"启用演示模式 (测试版)",description:"启用后，您的 UI 将会稍作修改以确保演示的一致性。这仅建议在演示时使用。在大多数情况下，您可以运行“Antigravity: Start Demo Mode”和“Antigravity: Stop Demo Mode”命令来控制此开关并更新您的 ~/.gemini/antigravity 数据目录。",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Agent Host Address",description:`When running commands, the agent will try to use this address, and fall back to to the "connector.host.featureDefault" host if not defined.

Note: hosts set here with auto-run enabled will have internet access restricted soon.`,settingType:"text",type:"string"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Permissions",label:"Agent 主机地址",description:"运行命令时，Agent 将尝试使用此地址，如果未定义，将回退到“connector.host.featureDefault”主机。\n\n注意：此处设置且启用了自动运行的主机，其互联网访问权限很快将会受到限制。",settingType:"text",type:"string"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Appearance",label:"Verbose agent chat",description:"Display and preserve intermediate thinking steps",settingType:"switch"}
{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Appearance",label:"Agent 详细聊天",description:"显示并保留中间思考步骤",settingType:"switch"}

{isProviderSetting:!0,screen:"Customizations",label:"Include Jetski Default Customizations",description:"When enabled, the agent will include default customizations, including default skills.",settingType:"switch"}

{settingKey:Mr.MAX_CLONES_PER_WORKSPACE,label:"每个工作区的最大克隆数",description:"每个活动源工作区缓存的最大预热工作区克隆数。",type:"number",min:1,max:8}

{action:"execute_url",label:"Execute URLs",description:"Allow/deny agent browser actuation access to specific URLs.",grants:r,onChangeGrants:f=>{t.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,f)},placeholder:"e.g., https://example.com",borderless:!0}

{action:"execute_url",label:"执行 URL",description:"允许/拒绝 Agent 浏览器对特定 URL 的操作访问权限。",grants:r,onChangeGrants:f=>{t.setPrefValue(Mr.PERMISSION_GRANTS_GLOBAL,f)},placeholder:"例如：https://example.com",borderless:!0}
{value:"*",label:"All tools (*)",description:"Hook will trigger if any tool is executed."}
{value:"*",label:"所有工具 (*)",description:"执行任何工具时都将触发钩子。"}
{value:"run_command",label:"run_command",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name matches run_command."}
{value:"run_command",label:"run_command",description:"仅当工具名称匹配 run_command 时才会触发钩子。"}
{value:"run_command|view_file",label:"run_command or view_file",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name matches run_command or view_file."}
{value:"run_command|view_file",label:"run_command 或 view_file",description:"仅当工具名称匹配 run_command 或 view_file 时才会触发钩子。"}
{value:"browser_.*",label:"Browser tools (browser_.*)",description:"Hook will only trigger if the tool name starts with browser_."}
{value:"browser_.*",label:"浏览器工具 (browser_.*)",description:"仅当工具名称以 browser_ 开头时才会触发钩子。"}

{settingKey:Mr.INCLUDE_JETSKI_DEFAULT_CUSTOMIZATIONS,label:"Include Jetski Default Customizations",description:"When enabled, the agent will include default customizations, including default skills."}
{settingKey:Mr.INCLUDE_JETSKI_DEFAULT_CUSTOMIZATIONS,label:"包含 Jetski 默认自定义配置",description:"启用后，Agent 将包含默认的自定义配置，包括默认技能。"}
{label:"管理钩子",description:"配置 Agent 钩子",rightElement:p(lo,{onClick:()=>{j("hooks")},children:"自定义"})}
{label:"技能自定义路径",description:F,currentList:ee,onDidChangeList:fe,placeholder:"输入目录路径..."}
{label:"Create Documents",description:"Gives the agent permission to create and upload documents to google drive",checked:g.canCreate,onCheckedChange:C}
{label:"创建文档",description:"赋予 Agent 创建并上传文档到 Google 云端硬盘的权限",checked:g.canCreate,onCheckedChange:C}
{label:"Search",description:"Gives the agent permission to search through google drive. The agent will only see file titles, not file contents",checked:g.canSearch,onCheckedChange:N}
{label:"搜索",description:"赋予 Agent 在 Google 云端硬盘中进行搜索的权限。Agent 只能看到文件标题，无法看到文件内容",checked:g.canSearch,onCheckedChange:N}

{label:"Marketplace Item URL",description:`Changes the base URL on each extension page. You must restart ${t.nameShort} to use the new marketplace after changing this value.`,configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceGalleryItemURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/item"}
{label:"插件市场商品 URL",description:"更改每个扩展页面的基础 URL。更改此值后，您必须重启 ${t.nameShort} 才能使用新的插件市场。",configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceGalleryItemURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/item"}

{label:"Marketplace Gallery URL",description:`Changes the base URL for marketplace search results. You must restart ${t.nameShort} to use the new marketplace after changing this value.`,configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceExtensionGalleryServiceURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/gallery"}

{label:"插件市场搜索 URL",description:"更改插件市场搜索结果的基础 URL。更改此值后，您必须重启 ${t.nameShort} 才能使用新的插件市场。",configurationKey:"antigravity.marketplaceExtensionGalleryServiceURL",placeholder:"https://open-vsx.org/vscode/gallery"}
{action:"read_file",label:"Read Files",description:"Paths the agent can read inside this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter file or directory path...",borderless:!0}
{action:"read_file",label:"Read Files",description:"Agent 在此工作区内可读取的路径。",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"输入文件或目录路径...",borderless:!0}
{action:"write_file",label:"Write Files",description:"Paths the agent can modify inside this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"Enter file or directory path...",borderless:!0}
{action:"write_file",label:"Write Files",description:"Agent 在此工作区内可修改的路径。",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"输入文件或目录路径...",borderless:!0}

{action:"unsandboxed",label:"Commands Outside Sandbox",description:"Commands the agent can run outside the sandbox in this workspace.",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"e.g., curl",borderless:!0}
{action:"unsandboxed",label:"沙盒外命令",description:"Agent 在此工作区内可在沙盒外运行的命令。",grants:V,onChangeGrants:x,placeholder:"例如：curl",borderless:!0}
{value:"safe_merge",label:"Safe Merge",description:"Checks for pending changes before merging.",enumValue:wte?.SAFE_MERGE??2}
{value:"safe_merge",label:"安全合并",description:"合并前检查是否存在未决更改。",enumValue:wte?.SAFE_MERGE??2}
{value:"overwrite",label:"覆盖",description:"覆盖目标工作区中的更改。",enumValue:wte?.OVERWRITE??1}

KB=({text:e,onClick:t,isActive:r,className:n})=>p("button",{type:"button","data-testid":`settings-nav-item-${e}`,className:Mt("flex items-center gap-1.5 group mx-2 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg cursor-pointer border-none text-left transition-all outline-none",r?"bg-sidebar-secondary":"hover:bg-sidebar-muted",n),onClick:t,children:p("span",{className:Mt("text-sm transition-colors select-none truncate flex-1",r?"text-foreground":"text-secondary-foreground group-hover:text-foreground"),children:e})})

KB=({text:e,onClick:t,isActive:r,className:n})=>{const mapping={"Account":"账户","Permissions":"权限","Appearance":"外观","Notifications":"通知","Models":"模型","Customizations":"自定义","Browser":"浏览器","Tab":"Tab 补全","Editor":"编辑器","App":"应用","Best of N":"Best of N","Shortcuts":"快捷键","Provide Feedback":"提供反馈"};return p("button",{type:"button","data-testid":`settings-nav-item-${e}`,className:Mt("flex items-center gap-1.5 group mx-2 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg cursor-pointer border-none text-left transition-all outline-none",r?"bg-sidebar-secondary":"hover:bg-sidebar-muted",n),onClick:t,children:p("span",{className:Mt("text-sm transition-colors select-none truncate flex-1",r?"text-foreground":"text-secondary-foreground group-hover:text-foreground"),children:mapping[e]||e})})}

h_s=`Specifies Agent's behavior when asking for review on artifacts, which are documents it creates to enable a richer conversation experience.
h_s=`指定 Agent 在请求审查产物（Agent 创建的用于提供更丰富对话体验的文档）时的行为。

`Controls whether terminal commands require your approval before running.

Note: A change to this setting will only apply to new messages sent to Agent. In-progress responses will use the previous setting value.`

`控制终端命令在运行前是否需要您的批准。

注意：对此设置的更改将仅适用于发送给 Agent 的新消息。进行中的响应将使用先前的设置值。`
resolveOptionToString:t=>{switch(t){case n0.EAGER:return"Always Proceed";case n0.OFF:return"Request Review";default:return"Proceed in Sandbox"}}
resolveOptionToString:t=>{switch(t){case n0.EAGER:return"始终继续";case n0.OFF:return"请求审查";default:return"在沙盒中运行"}}

"Agent never asks for confirmation before executing terminal commands (except those in the Deny list). This provides the Agent with the maximum ability to operate over long periods without intervention, but also has the highest risk of an Agent executing an unsafe terminal command."
"Agent 在执行终端命令之前从不请求确认（拒绝列表中的命令除外）。这为 Agent 提供了在没有干预的情况下长期运行的最大能力，但也存在 Agent 执行不安全终端命令的最高风险。"
"Agent always asks for confirmation before executing terminal commands (except those in the Allow list)."
"Agent 在执行终端命令之前始终请求确认（允许列表中的命令除外）。"
"Terminal command automatically proceeds if the command runs inside the sandbox. Otherwise, it requests review."
"如果终端命令在沙盒中运行，则自动执行该命令。否则，它将请求审查。"

" For Unix shells, an allow list entry matches a command if its space-separated tokens form a prefix of the command's tokens. For PowerShell, the entry tokens may match any contiguous subsequence of the command tokens."
" 对于 Unix shell，如果允许列表条目以空格分隔的标记是命令标记的前缀，则该条目匹配该命令。对于 PowerShell，条目标记可以匹配命令标记的任何连续子序列。"
case Wf.DISABLED:return"Disabled";case Wf.ALWAYS_ASK:return"Request Review";case Wf.TURBO:return"Always Proceed";default:return"Request Review"
case Wf.DISABLED:return"已禁用";case Wf.ALWAYS_ASK:return"请求审查";case Wf.TURBO:return"始终继续";default:return"请求审查"

Ivn=[{value:Vz.TURBO,label:"Always Proceed",description:"Agent never asks for review. This maximizes the autonomy of the Agent, but also has the highest risk of the Agent operating over unsafe or injected Artifact content.",disabledInSecureMode:!0},{value:Vz.ALWAYS,label:"Always Ask",description:"Agent always asks for review.",disabledInSecureMode:!1}]

Ivn=[{value:Vz.TURBO,label:"始终继续",description:"Agent 从不请求审查。这最大化了 Agent 的自主性，但也具有 Agent 操作不安全或注入的 Artifact 内容的最高风险。",disabledInSecureMode:!0},{value:Vz.ALWAYS,label:"始终询问",description:"Agent 始终请求审查。",disabledInSecureMode:!1}]

options:[{label:"Always Proceed",value:$U.EAGER,description:"Always auto-execute commands unless they are in your deny list. This also allows Agent to auto-execute Browser controls."},{label:"Request Review",value:$U.OFF,description:"Never auto-execute commands unless they are in your allow list.",isDefaultWhenAvailable:!0}]
options:[{label:"始终继续",value:$U.EAGER,description:"始终自动执行命令，除非它们在您的拒绝列表中。这也允许 Agent 自动执行浏览器控制。"},{label:"请求审查",value:$U.OFF,description:"从不自动执行命令，除非它们在您的允许列表中。",isDefaultWhenAvailable:!0}]

"Agent never asks for confirmation before executing terminal commands (except those in the Deny list). This provides the Agent with the maximum ability to operate over long periods without intervention, but also has the highest risk of an Agent executing an unsafe terminal command."
"Agent 在执行终端命令之前从不请求确认（拒绝列表中的命令除外）。这为 Agent 提供了在没有干预的情况下长期运行的最大能力，但也存在 Agent 执行不安全终端命令的最高风险。"

"Agent 在执行终端命令之前始终请求确认（允许列表中的命令除外）。"
"Terminal command automatically proceeds if the command runs inside the sandbox. Otherwise, it requests review."

" For Unix shells, an allow list entry matches a command if its space-separated tokens form a prefix of the command's tokens. For PowerShell, the entry tokens may match any contiguous subsequence of the command tokens."
" 对于 Unix shell，如果允许列表条目以空格分隔的标记是命令标记的前缀，则该条目匹配该命令。对于 PowerShell，条目标记可以匹配命令标记的任何连续子序列。"
